name: Marmiting Captain
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>切</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>盛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can shuffle 1 card from your hand into the Deck, then draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a monster.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can shuffle 1 card from your hand into the Deck, then draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a monster.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can shuffle 1 card from your hand into the Deck, then draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon it if it is a monster.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
